title: Heap sift-down uses at most 2·height comparisons
statement_informal: Sift-down in a binary heap uses at most 2·height comparisons.

cost_model.notes: Up to two comparisons per level (two children, then larger vs parent) along the descent.

references: Knuth, TAOCP Vol. 3 §5.2.3 — heapsort and sift-down (siftup).
